description: Process the 4-band Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF located at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif, where bands 1 through 4 represent SWIR1, NIR, Red, and Green. Create three new derived bands named exactly 'spectral_mean', 'spectral_range', and 'nir_deviation'. The 'spectral_mean' band must compute the pixel-wise average of all 4 bands: (band_1 + band_2 + band_3 + band_4) / 4.0. The 'spectral_range' band must compute the pixel-wise range (max minus min) across all 4 bands: max(max(band_1, band_2), max(band_3, band_4)) - min(min(band_1, band_2), min(band_3, band_4)). The 'nir_deviation' band must compute the normalized NIR departure from the spectral mean: (band_2 - spectral_mean) / spectral_mean. Save the final product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/spectral_variability.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/spectral_variability.tif.
